experience.organization: Department of Mathematics, Krishna Institute of Engineering and Technology

research_interests: Existence of primitive pair, the existence of r-primitive k-normal pair and the existence of a finite arithmetic progression of r-primitive elements with first term being k-normal, with prescribed traces and norms over finite fields

publications.title: Existence of primitive pairs with two prescribed traces over finite fields
On pairs of r-primitive and k-normal elements with prescribed traces over finite fields
Fields having arithmetic progression of r-primitive and k-normal elements with prescribed traces
Fields having primitive pairs with prescribed norms

projects.title: Hardy Hilbert Spaces & Toeplitz Operators
projects.description: Enlightening Elementary introduction to Hardy-Hilbert Space and Spectral Properties of Toeplitz Operators under guidance of Dr. Jitendriya Swain Sir, Assistant Professor, Department of Mathematics, IIT Guwahati.

projects.title: Abelian Forcing Set
projects.description: Seminar on Abelian Forcing Set: if (ab)n = anbn for all a, b belonging to a group G then which property of these n's would imply that G is abelian at IIT Guwahati.

conferences.title: Journées Arithmétiques 2023
conferences.description: Presented my paper entitled 'Existence of primitive pairs with two prescribed traces over finite fields' at the Conference Journées Arithmétiques 2023 held at the University of Lorraine, Campus Aiguillettes, Nancy, France from 3 July 2023 to 7 July 2023.

conferences.title: 38rd Annual Conference of the Ramanujan Mathematical Society
conferences.description: Presented a paper titled 'Fields having primitive pairs with prescribed norms' at the Department of Mathematics, IIT Guwahati, during 22nd December - 24th December, 2023.

conferences.title: International Meet on Number Theory
conferences.description: Participated in the International Meet on Number Theory to commemorate the 135th birth anniversary of Srinivas Ramanujan held at IIT Kanpur during 27th February 2023 to 1st March 2023.

conferences.title: Analytic number theory
conferences.description: Attended a workshop on 'Analytic number theory' organized by Kerela School of Mathematics (KSOM) from 15th Jan to 24th Jan 2023.

awards.title: Research Scholar Travel Award
awards.description: Awarded Research Scholar Travel Award (RSTA) of INR 1.5 lacs, IIT Delhi for presenting my research work at the Conference Journées Arithmétiques 2023 Nancy, France.
